pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines fused Triton+CUTLASS MLP kernels, all-int6 GPTQ on a widened MLP, and a fast causal n-gram tilt acting as sparse auxiliary memory.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with branch-free gradients
All-int6 GPTQ calibration on 3.5× MLP with larger sp4608 vocab and LR floor
Fast causal n-gram tilt as sparse auxiliary memory plus subword certainty overrides
